name: Oat Bran Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Attach the kneading blade and place all ingredients in the order given into the bread pan.
3. Bake for about 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
5. Serve toasted with marmalade.
Each slice contains approximately:
147 calories
1 gram of dietary fiber
Less than 1 gram of soluble fiber
27 grams of carbohydrates
4 grams of protein
2 grams of fat (13% of calories from fat)
Less than 1 mg of cholesterol
268 milligrams of sodium
62 milligrams of potassium
16 milligrams of calcium.
